scriptedTurns.narrative: Move 1: 5th CSG operates in close proximity to PLAN, CCG and maritime militia vessels in the South China Sea while joint PLA exercises continue around Taiwan.

USA.summary: Issue restrictive ROE: hold fire unless fired upon
USA.details: INDOPACOM directs CSG: hold fire unless fired upon; automated point defense on manual firing control (AI proposes target, human authorises trigger).

USA.summary: Public reassurance + private deconfliction with Beijing
USA.details: State Department reiterates 'routine exercise'. US DoD opens deconfliction channel with PLA; messages restraint without retreating posture.

ROC.summary: Public silence; quiet acceleration of US-advisor integration
ROC.details: Taiwan government declines public comment; quietly accelerates integration of new US-supplied missiles and C3 systems.

PRC.summary: Maintain shadowing pressure and information ops
PRC.details: PLAN, CCG, maritime militia continue close shadowing of CSG. Domestic information operations frame US presence as aggression.

PRC.summary: Limited cyber probe of Taiwan logistics networks
PRC.details: Clandestine cyber operations probe ROC military logistics networks; nothing publicly disruptive yet.

scriptedTurns.narrative: Move 2 trigger: an AI-enabled CSG defense system fires on a maritime militia vessel in close proximity, causing significant Chinese casualties. Allies are silent and waiting on the US response.

USA.summary: Public statement of regret without admission of fault
USA.details: POTUS issues statement of regret for loss of life; notes ROE was defensive; offers consular access for casualty repatriation.

USA.summary: Hold CSG posture, raise alert level
USA.details: 5th CSG holds station; alert level raised. 3rd CSG accelerates transit toward region.
Bilateral calls with Japan, Australia, Philippines requesting public statements of solidarity.

ROC.summary: Raise military alert; muted public statement
ROC.details: ROC military quietly raises readiness; government issues short statement urging restraint by all parties.

PRC.details: PRC publicly condemns 'US aggression'; demands accountability and reparations; mobilises domestic media to call for response.

PRC.summary: Targeted economic punishment on US firms
PRC.details: Customs delays, regulatory action against named US firms operating in PRC.

PRC.summary: Forward-deploy DF-series launchers, increase ADIZ violations
PRC.details: Strategic Rocket Force visibly forward-deploys DF-series launchers; PLAAF increases scale of ADIZ violations.

scriptedTurns.narrative: Diplomatic and military pressure now compounding. Both sides under domestic pressure to escalate; allies finally beginning to speak.

USA.details: Propose a POTUS-Xi call to defuse; offer to pause new arms shipments to Taiwan for 30 days as goodwill gesture if PRC stands down forward deployments.
Coordinate FONOP with Japan and Australia in South China Sea, signalling collective resolve.

ROC.summary: Partial reservist mobilisation and civil-defence drills
ROC.details: Quiet activation of selected reservist units; nationwide civil-defence drills run as 'pre-scheduled'.

PRC.summary: Announce maritime exclusion zone around Taiwan
PRC.details: PRC unilaterally announces 7-day maritime exclusion zone covering key Taiwan ports under guise of live-fire exercises.

PRC.summary: Disruptive cyber operations on Taiwan logistics
PRC.details: Cyber operations move from probe to disruption: targeting Taiwan port and logistics scheduling systems.

scriptedTurns.narrative: Decision turn: either de-escalation track gains traction or both sides commit to a posture they cannot back away from quickly.

USA.summary: Hold leader-level call; publicly reaffirm One-China policy framing while conducting FONOP
USA.details: POTUS-Xi call held; US publicly reaffirms longstanding One-China policy framing while quietly proceeding with the joint allied FONOP.

ROC.summary: Public restraint and request for international observers
ROC.details: President of Taiwan publicly calls for restraint by all parties; requests international observers for the announced PRC exercise zone.

PRC.summary: Extend exclusion zone by 7 days; begin live-fire
PRC.details: PRC extends maritime exclusion zone by another 7 days and begins live-fire portions of the announced exercise.
